title: Pillowy French Almond Tart
description: Jammy, pillowy French dessert featuring ground almonds in a crowd-pleasing papillote. Perfect for a weeknight treat.
instructions: Make a 12-inch paper or parchment papillote by tracing a circle on the center, with an X for the corners.
In a bowl, combine the ground almonds, granulated sugar, and salt.
In a separate bowl, whip the egg whites until frothy, then fold into the almond mixture.
Pour the butter and almond extract into the bowl and mix until smooth.
Transfer the almond paste to the center of the papillote, spreading it evenly.
Fold the bottom of the papillote up over the filling, then fold in the sides and the top.
Bake the tart for 15 minutes, and reduce heat to 375°F (190°C).
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until the pastry is golden brown.
Let it cool for 5 minutes before serving.
Unfold the papillote to reveal the jammy, pillowy tart.
